title: Sportmonks Fixture
description: Schema for a Sportmonks Football fixture entity returned by the /fixtures and /livescores endpoints.

state_id.description: Fixture state (e.g., not started, in play, finished).

name.description: Display name of the fixture (e.g., 'Team A vs Team B').

starting_at.description: Scheduled kickoff timestamp in ISO 8601 UTC.

starting_at_timestamp.description: Scheduled kickoff as a Unix timestamp.

result_info.description: Textual result summary, e.g. 'Team A won after extra time'.

length.description: Total length of the match in minutes.

placeholder.description: True when fixture participants are not yet known.

has_odds.description: True when odds data is available for the fixture.

has_premium_odds.description: True when premium odds data is available.
